verified.notes: MI Options is a free counseling program with no age, income, or asset eligibility tests for seniors; open to adults including older adults and people with disabilities

programs.notes: MI Options is a free counseling program with no age, income, or asset eligibility tests for seniors; open to adults including older adults and people with disabilities

verified.notes: Income limits from March 2026 update are annual figures divided by 12 and rounded ($28,952.50/12=2412.71→2413; $39,127.50/12=3260.625→3261). No assets test or main phone found. Tribal members 55+ also eligible.

programs.notes: Income limits from March 2026 update are annual figures divided by 12 and rounded ($28,952.50/12=2412.71→2413; $39,127.50/12=3260.625→3261). No assets test or main phone found. Tribal members 55+ also eligible.

programs.programName: MiCAFE (Michigan's Coordinated Access to Food for the Elderly)

verified.notes: MiCAFE is an assistance program for SNAP eligibility (age 60+); no specific income/assets limits found in sources as it refers to SNAP criteria

programs.notes: MiCAFE is an assistance program for SNAP eligibility (age 60+); no specific income/assets limits found in sources as it refers to SNAP criteria

verified.notes: Program is a volunteer opportunity for low-income seniors age 55+ to provide companionship; no central application phone or senior recipient eligibility found from official sources
